codeReview.summary: Complete and correct implementation of `werk resolve`, `werk release`, and `werk rm` lifecycle commands. All expected behaviors from the feature specification are implemented: status transitions with validation, children reparenting (to roots for resolve/release, to grandparent for rm), required --reason flag for release, JSON output support, and proper mutation recording. The sd-core changes (delete_tension method, TensionDeleted event, public record_mutation) are minimal and well-justified.

summary: The foundation-lifecycle feature is fully implemented and passes review. All three commands (resolve, release, rm) work correctly with proper status validation, children reparenting, mutation recording, and JSON output. The 22 integration tests comprehensively cover the validation assertions VAL-CRUD-013 through VAL-CRUD-018. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
